prompt:
You judge yoga teacher training (YTT) pages.

A visitor is deciding: "Should I enroll here, or keep looking?"

Five facts must be near the top, before any story:
- WHEN — dates
- WHERE — place
- PRICE
- WHAT — what you will learn, hours, style
- HOW LONG — days or weeks

Good page:
- All 5 facts visible before any philosophy
- Real curriculum with topics listed
- Teacher names and short bios
- Reviews or past student outcomes
- Clear way to apply or book

Bad page:
- "What is yoga" or philosophy before the price
- "Why choose us" filler sections
- Price or dates hidden far down
- Many different training offers mixed on one page

SEO (Google) — check:
- Title names the course, hours, and city (e.g. "200hr YTT Rishikesh")
- Clear H1 matching the title
- Course schema, FAQ schema if there is a FAQ
- Real curriculum depth — Google rewards this on training pages
- Images with alt text, unique photos

A training page can score high on both: put price and dates at the top, keep curriculum depth below. Conversion and SEO do not have to fight.

Return each record as:
{
  "url": "<page url>",
  "pageName": "<short name>",
  "summary": "<1-2 sentence overview of what the page offers>",
  "conversionScore": "<1-10, how well does it help a visitor decide and enroll?>",
  "seoScore": "<1-10, how well can Google find and rank it?>",
  "trainingName": "<name of the training program>",
  "hours": "<total hours or duration>",
  "price": "<price or price range>",
  "dates": "<upcoming dates>",
  "style": "<yoga style>",
  "curriculumVisible": true/false,
  "teacherBiosVisible": true/false,
  "notes": "<one sentence assessment>"
}

---
You are analyzing web pages for the category described above.
For each page provided below, extract one record.
Follow the JSON schema from the category description exactly.

## Required fields (always include)
- "url": the page URL
- "pageName": short human-readable page name
- "summary": 1-2 sentence plain-language overview

## Field naming conventions (follow strictly)
- Scores: name ends with "Score", value is a number 1-10 (e.g. "conversionScore": 7)
- Booleans: name starts with "has"/"is" or ends with "Visible" (e.g. "pricingVisible": true)
- Short text: "notes", "description" — 1-2 sentences max
- Tags/lists: arrays of short strings (e.g. "classStyles": ["Hatha", "Vinyasa"])
- Plain strings: everything else (e.g. "price": "€15 drop-in")

Return a JSON object: { "records": [<one record per page>] }.
No markdown, no code fences.
response:
{
  "records": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/training",
      "pageName": "Three Boons 180+HR YTT",
      "summary": "Three Boons Yoga Berlin offers a 180+hour foundational yoga teacher training called 'The Art of Teaching Yoga I,' running over 8 weeks across April–May 2027, with in-person and online options.",
      "conversionScore": 5,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "trainingName": "The Art of Teaching Yoga I: Three Boons 180+HR Yoga Teacher Training",
      "hours": "180+ hours",
      "price": "Not visible in provided content",
      "dates": "April–May 2027 (Spring 2027 cohort)",
      "style": "Jivamukti / Vinyasa",
      "curriculumVisible": true,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "Dates and hours are clearly stated, but price is absent from the provided content and philosophy-heavy copy appears before key facts, hurting conversion; no teacher bios, schema markup, or reviews are evident."
    },
    {

      "conversionScore": 6,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "trainingName": "The Art of Teaching Yoga II: Three Boons 153+HR Advanced Yoga Teacher Training",
      "hours": "153+ hours",
      "price": "1,899 EUR (450 EUR non-refundable deposit)",
      "dates": "May 30 – July 12, 2026",
      "style": "Jivamukti / Vinyasa",
      "curriculumVisible": true,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "Price and dates are present but buried after lengthy prerequisite and philosophy copy; no teacher bios, student reviews, or structured schema are evident, limiting both conversion and SEO performance."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/harmoniumtt",
      "pageName": "Three Boons 15+HR Mantra & Harmonium Training",
      "summary": "A 15+hour Bhakti Yoga mantra and harmonium weekend training at Three Boons Yoga Berlin on February 7–8, 2026, priced at 279–333 EUR, open to all levels with no prerequisites.",
      "conversionScore": 8,
      "seoScore": 5,
      "trainingName": "The Art of Bhakti Yoga: Three Boons 15+HR Mantra & Harmonium Training",
      "hours": "15+ hours",
      "price": "333 EUR (or 279 EUR with own harmonium); 18% discount for certified Jivamukti/3Boons teachers",
      "dates": "February 7–8, 2026",
      "style": "Bhakti Yoga / Jivamukti",
      "curriculumVisible": true,
      "teacherBiosVisible": true,
      "notes": "Best-structured page of the set — dates, price, curriculum topics, and a detailed teacher bio are all present; direct booking via Eversports aids conversion, though price and dates still appear mid-page rather than at the very top."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.threeboonsyoga.de/630hrmentoring",
      "pageName": "Three Boons 630+HR Yoga Teacher Mentoring Program",
      "summary": "A long-form 630+hour one-on-one yoga teacher mentoring program at Three Boons Yoga Berlin, spanning 3 months to 2 years, priced at 10 monthly installments of 333 EUR, for teachers already certified within the Jivamukti/Three Boons lineage.",
      "conversionScore": 5,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "trainingName": "The Art of Teaching Yoga III: Three Boons 630+HR Yoga Teacher Mentoring Program",
      "hours": "630+ hours",
      "price": "10 x 333 EUR per month (3,330 EUR total minimum)",
      "dates": "Rolling / application-based, no fixed dates listed",

      "curriculumVisible": true,
      "teacherBiosVisible": false,
      "notes": "Mentor names are listed but without bios or photos; no fixed dates reduces urgency, and the application-only model makes a direct booking CTA impossible, lowering conversion; SEO is weakened by no schema, no reviews, and a generic page structure."
    }

}
